title: citrus × limonia khatta
intro: Citrus × limonia khatta, also known as khatta or kagzi lime, is a natural hybrid of sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) and lime (Citrus aurantifolia). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus × limonia khatta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Citrus × limonia khatta is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and juices, which are consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
